quiz_replacement: Ta eo ej juon ṃwilin pinej jenkwan (replacement behavior)?
search_placeholder: Pukot antecedent, ṃwil, consequence, kakōḷḷe ko, jikin...
quick_fill_placeholder: joñak: "Ri-jikuuḷ eaar joḷọk peba ilo iien math ke kar kajjitōk bwe en kwaḷọk jerbal eo an, ri-kaki eaar jeoñe ḷọk ilo aenōṃṃan"
nl_edit_placeholder: joñak: "ukōte consequence ñan ri-kaki eaar jeoñe ḷọk"
reinforce_step_1: Jino kōn kapen kein-kakapilōk eḷap (joñak, FR-1 ak FR-2)
reinforce_step_2: Ñe ṃwil eo ej pād wōt jet iien (~80%), kotaki ratio kōn 1-2
reinforce_step_3: Eṃṃakūt ñan schedule ekkar (VR) ñan kōjparok eo eḷapḷọk an pidodo
fidelity_tip_1: Etale wāween ko an jerbal ippān ri-jerbal ro
fidelity_tip_4: Ḷōmṇak kōn pinej ko an jikin eo me rej bōbrae jerbal eo
record_tip_1: Koba ta eo eaar waḷọk ṃokta, ilo iien, im ālikin ṃwil eo
record_tip_2: Kwaḷọk jikin/jeklaḷ eo ñe ej maroñ
record_tip_3: Kwōj maroñ likūt elōñ men ko raar waḷọk
record_tip_4: Kōjerbal kōmḷan ko rejejjet im rej alikkar
quiz_opt_identify_why: Ñan kile UNIN an juon ṃwil waḷọk
quiz_opt_any_stops: Jabdewōt ṃwil ej kabōjrak abṇōṇō eo
ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space: Juon iien kakkije? Jipañ? Juon ri-roñjake? Jikin?
ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li: Kobaḷọk juon kakōḷḷe an team eo... (Shift+Enter ñan juon laajrak ekāāl)
ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c: Kobaḷọk meḷeḷe, kein bōbrae, ak abṇōṇō ko rejejjet... joñak, "Ri-jikuuḷ eo ebar wōr an speech delay" ak "Eñin ej juon ri-jikuuḷ ilo middle school"
ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun: Jabdewōt bar meḷeḷe ko jet (eaar mōk ke ajri eo, kwōle, im men ko jet)...
ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra: Kōmḷeḷeik wāween eo kwōj kōṇaan kamminene kake...
ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a: Kōmḷeḷeik persona an ri-jikuuḷ eo... joñak, "Kwe juon ri-jikuuḷ ilo grade 3 me ej inepata ilo iien math im ekkā an jañ im kiil ḷọk..."
ph.describe_what_your_child_did: Kōmḷeḷeik ta eo ajri eo nejūṃ eaar kōṃṃane...
ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas: joñak: "Ej ke juon token economy kadikḷọk off-task behavior ilo iien katakin math?"
ph.eg_hitting_peers_when_frustrated: joñak: Deñḷọke ro jeran ñe ej illu
ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_: joñak: "Ri-jikuuḷ ej kakkōt juṃae im abwin ḷoor naan in jiroñ."
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad: joñak: "ri-jikuuḷ eo ewōr an autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "ekāāl ñan jikuuḷ in"
ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg: Likūt mejānkajjik in ṃwil eo ñan scale-e (joñak, "Ri-jikuuḷ enaaj pād wōt ioon jea eo an ilo iien jerbal make iaan iuṃwin 15 minit")
ph.rationale_which_antecedent_does_this_: Un eo (ewi antecedent eo eñin ej uwaake?)
ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked:
Kōḷmānḷọkjeṇ kōn wāween eo aṃ...
• Ta eo eaar jeraaṃṃan?
• Ta eo kwōnaaj kōṃṃane āinwōt juon wāween jet?
• Ewi strategy ko kwōj kōṇaan kamminene kake tokālik?
ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt: Kwaḷọk ta eo kwōj loe ilo ṃweo — kajoor ko, inepata ko, meḷeḷe in manit, ak naan in jiroñ ñan team eo an jikuuḷ...
ph.target_behavior_what_you_want_to_redu: 🎯 Ṃwil eo eṃōj jitōñe (ta eo kwōj kōṇaan kadikḷọke)
ph.type_your_observation_note_or_click_t: Taipi lale eo aṃ, kakōḷḷe, ak kallik mic eo ñan kōnono...
ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a: Taipi uwaak eo aṃ ijin. Kwaḷọk aolep im kōjerbal kajin in jerbal...
ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ: Ta eo kwe ak juon rūtto emaroñ kōṃṃane āinwōt juon wāween jet?
ph.what_environmental_change_will_you_ma: Ewi oktak ilo jikin eo kwōnaaj kōṃṃane?
ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional: Ta eo eaar kōṃṃan bwe kwōn eñjake āinwōt in? (optional)
ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi: Ta eo eaar waḷọk ṃokta jān aṃ eñjake āinwōt in?

toast.need_at_least_2_phases_in_the_grap: Eaikuj rōḷap iiō ruo phase ilo Graph eo (baseline + intervention)
